mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transactions (user_id, category_id, type, amount, memo, transaction_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{memo}, #{transactionDate})
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.user_id, t.category_id, t.type, t.amount, t.memo, t.transaction_date, t.created_at, t.updated_at, t.deleted_at, c.code AS category_code, c.name AS category_name FROM transactions t JOIN categories c ON t.category_id = c.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE transactions
category_id = #{categoryId}, type = #{type}, amount = #{amount}, memo = #{memo}, transaction_date = #{transactionDate},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE transactions SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
